title: Senior Doctor - BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited:
BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited!
